allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 22148 | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(1..3 | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Attempt $_ : Status $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Attempt $_ : ERROR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
